name: gitsyncmarks
description: Bookmark sync via GitHub. Linkwarden synergy, Smart Search, and Companion App. Direct, secure, private.

scripts.screenshots: npm run build:chrome && npm run generate-screenshots
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build:chrome && npx playwright test
scripts.test:e2e:smoke: npm run build:chrome && npx playwright test e2e/smoke.spec.js
scripts.test:e2e:options: npm run build:chrome && npx playwright test e2e/options-ui.spec.js
scripts.test:e2e:sync: npm run build:chrome && npx playwright test e2e/connection.spec.js e2e/sync.spec.js
